case_title: CURTIS W. BERLIND VS. BIO FUEL SYSTEMS, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BERLIND, CURTIS W. AS TO DEFENDANT BIO FUEL SYSTEMS, INC. CSLB LIC.#711670 NGUYEN, TAI THANH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO APR-28-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-02-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-28-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-28-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-28-2016 - JUDGMENT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERLIND, CURTIS W. AS TO DEFENDANT BIO FUEL SYSTEMS, INC. CSLB LIC.#711670 NGUYEN, TAI THANH
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF NEEDING MORE TIME TO DO SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERLIND, CURTIS W.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $75.00 SERVED FEB-26-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BIO FUEL SYSTEMS, INC. CSLB LIC.#711670

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERLIND, CURTIS W. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIO FUEL SYSTEMS, INC. CSLB LIC.#711670 NGUYEN, TAI THANH $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,225.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, PARTIALLY SATISFIED, THE AMOUNT RECEIVED IN PARTIAL SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT IS $7,980.22 AS TO DEFENDANT BIO FUEL SYSTEMS, INC. CSLB LIC.#711670 NGUYEN, TAI THANH
